name: translate-web-to-chinese
description: Codex plugin for crawling linked documentation pages and generating a Simplified Chinese mirror without requiring an API key.

interface.shortDescription: Crawl and translate linked documentation into Simplified Chinese
interface.longDescription: Use the Translate Web To Chinese plugin to crawl a bounded documentation tree, preserve page relations, and produce a Chinese Markdown and HTML mirror using Codex-backed translation flows.
defaultPrompt: Use the translation plugin to crawl this docs site, preserve the page graph, and build a Simplified Chinese mirror.
